alerts.title: Leaks: Re-confirming details
alerts.detail: Social media rumors continue to circulate without any official confirmation from Anthropic. The hype remains anchored to the Alex Heath leak and the Azure backend sightings.

alerts.title: Leaks: Re-confirming details
alerts.detail: Social media rumors continue to circulate without any official confirmation from Anthropic. The hype remains anchored to the Alex Heath leak and the Azure backend sightings.

alerts.title: Leaks: High alert for launch
alerts.detail: General community consensus is reaching a fever pitch with the combination of the Alex Heath leak and the continued presence of Azure checkpoints. Traders are expecting an announcement before close of business.

alerts.title: Leaks: Alex Heath mentions June 9
alerts.detail: Tech journalist Alex Heath has been cited in online discussions claiming sources indicate the model is scheduled for release today, adding significant credibility to the rumors.

verdict.reasoning: Despite heavy leaks on X and Reddit confirming the existence of 'Claude Fable 5' and spotted API endpoints on cloud providers, the massive $35B Apollo infrastructure deal and S-1 IPO filing mean Anthropic's PR is locked today. A release later this week (missing the June 9 Polymarket deadline) aligns better with corporate timelines.
